title: Consent-lifecycle hygiene — delivery hand-off
subtitle: Discovery run · consent-lifecycle-hygiene · synthetic data, non-production

blocks.p: For a consent operations analyst who must ensure every PSU withdrawal is honoured and acknowledged within the bank's 5s default, revoke acknowledgement latency and lifecycle-state drift are invisible until a customer complains.
This causes silent SLA breaches, stale-state errors in care handling, and no audit-ready proof of timely withdrawal.
Residual risk Low — conditional on read-only observability over consent metadata (DR-2.1; CTRL-DP-001/002/003; PDPL-15.2, PDPL-6.2).

list: No consent content beyond lifecycle state and timestamps
Hub-bound reads via the P6 egress port

blocks.p: A consent-lifecycle hygiene monitor makes timeliness and drift tangible. See wireframe.html — direction only; delivery authors the solution from scratch.

blocks.note: Explicitly out of scope: the withdrawal flow itself, the PSU banking app, and bulk consent migration.
